title: tanarius helferi
intro: Tanarius helferi, also known as Anubias barteri var. helferi, is a type of aquatic plant native to Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tanarius helferi include its ability to purify water, reduce stress, and promote a sense of calmness. Herbal preparations of Tanarius helferi can be found in the form of tea or infusion, which is often used to treat digestive issues and as a natural remedy for anxiety.
